title: Uniblock NFT
description: Schema representing a non-fungible token with metadata, collection information, and transfer data as returned by the Uniblock Unified API.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the NFT collection.

tokenId.description: The unique token ID within the collection.

animationUrl.description: URL to the NFT animation or media file.

collectionName.description: The name of the parent collection.

attributes.description: List of trait attributes for the NFT.

NftAttribute.description: A trait attribute associated with an NFT.

traitType.description: The name of the trait category.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the collection.

totalSupply.description: The total number of NFTs in the collection.

floorPrice.description: The current floor price of the collection.

chain.description: The blockchain network the collection exists on.

NftTransfer.description: An NFT transfer event between two addresses.

transactionHash.description: The hash of the transaction containing this transfer.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the NFT collection.

tokenId.description: The token ID of the transferred NFT.

quantity.description: The number of tokens transferred (relevant for ERC-1155).

blockNumber.description: The block number in which the transfer occurred.

blockTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the block in which the transfer occurred.
